episode_event_ch0302_ch0303_mini/4001_10: Phew... Managed to catch ’em somehow.
These Paradox Pokémon were super tough!

Most impressive, you two. I knew requesting
your assistance was the right decision.

Catching unknown Pokémon so effortlessly
is no easy feat.

Gotta say, La Primera, it was actually pretty
tiring.
Anyway...

Pasio is such a bizarre place—Paradox
Pokémon suddenly showin’ up like this.

Yes. This island is teeming with mysteries—
as are Paradox Pokémon.
Rika, Poppy... I have a proposal for you.

How would you like to make these two your
partner Pokémon?
Huh?
You’d be OK with that?

There’s still so much we don’t know about
them. Wouldn’t it be better to hand ’em off
to researchers?

No... That’s precisely why I’d like to leave
them with you.

I’ve already entrusted Paradox Pokémon to a
number of talented Trainers on Pasio...

And I’m told that their role in sync pairs is
advancing research about their ecology.
In light of this...

Seeing as you tamed them, I’ve decided I
can safely entrust them to you two.
How does that sound?
In that case, sure!

I was wantin’ to see how powerful this
Great Tusk really is anyway.
Yaaay! I’m happy I get to be with Treadsy!
Let’s do our best together!

I’m glad. I suspect you will be splendid
partners.

Be the light that guides Paradox Pokémon,
Trainers.
